channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Adobe is debuting an AI assistant for Photoshop
item.description: Adobe is also adding new AI-powered image editing features to Firefly.

item.title: Achingly Sad Video Documents First-Known Case of Red Fox Attacking a Wolf Pup
item.description: The incident was likely an opportunistic kill, with the fox preying on the small pup to possibly threaten the survival of the predator species.

item.title: 33 home office upgrades under £50: I hunted through Amazon's Spring Sale to find the essential business gear for organising your workspace
item.description: Spring clean your desk - these bargain home office accessories are perfect for productivity.

item.title: MacBook Neo Review: No Other Budget Laptop Can Compete
item.description: The MacBook Neo isn't trying to be anything but what it is—a solid MacBook experience for $600.

item.title: ‘Project Hail Mary’ Rocks
item.description: Ryan Gosling stars in the new Andy Weir adaptation from directors Phil Lord and Chris Miller, out March 20.

item.title: Google Docs : Gemini va enfin pouvoir faire le sale boulot à votre place
item.description: Google vient de dévoiler les nouvelles fonctionnalités Gemini à venir dans Google Workspace. L’assistant IA de Google va se transformer en un collaborateur actif pour vous soulager des tâches ingrates.

item.title: Apple MacBook Neo Review: Delicious, Low-Hanging Fruit
item.description: At $599, the MacBook Neo is Apple’s first budget laptop. For the most part, Apple cut corners in the right places and made a MacBook its intended buyers will adore.

item.title: I Used Google’s New Gemini-Powered ‘Help Me Create’ Tool in Docs. It’s Great at Corporate-Speak
item.description: Google has injected Docs, Drive, Sheets, and Slides with its Gemini assistant, adding new features that can pull information from your emails and the web to help you draft content. I gave it a whirl.

item.title: Google’s Gemini AI is getting a bigger role across Docs, Sheets, and Slides
item.description: Google is embedding its Gemini AI assistant even more deeply within its Workspace apps. The changes, which are rolling out to Google Workspace and AI plan subscribers, include a new Gemini chat window inside Google Docs, a way to generate entire spreadsheets with AI, and a new Gemini-powered search feature in Drive. While Google Docs […]

item.title: MacBook Neo review: the Mac for the masses
item.description: The MacBook Neo is basically the M1 MacBook Air all over again. That laptop changed the game in 2020, and became the default option for just about anyone who wanted a great all-around thin-and-light laptop and could spend $1,000. The M1 Air was good enough that you could still buy a new one until last […]

item.title: Project Hail Mary is popcorn sci-fi at its best
item.description: Have you ever wondered what Arrival would be like if it was also a goofy buddy comedy? Me neither. And yet the strange combination somehow fits together in Project Hail Mary. The movie follows a scientist who travels to the far reaches of the universe to save humanity and is forced to work alongside an […]

item.title: You can now ask Photoshop’s AI assistant to edit images for you
item.description: Adobe announced more agentic AI features for its Creative Cloud apps this week, allowing users to edit images and documents by describing the changes to a chatbot. A native AI-assistant is now available in public beta for Photoshop on web and mobile, and some Adobe apps, including Acrobat and Express, will soon be available to […]

item.title: Zoom introduces an AI-powered office suite, says AI avatars for meetings arrive this month
item.description: Zoom is also introducing a real-time deepfake detection tech for meetings

item.title: Google rolls out new Gemini capabilities to Docs, Sheets, Slides, and Drive
item.description: The idea behind the new features is to make the apps more personal and capable to help users get things done faster, right within the platforms themselves.

item.title: Hyperscale Power is the latest startup to challenge 140-year-old transformer tech
item.description: Startup Hyperscale Power is developing technology that promises to shrink power transformers, freeing up precious space within data centers.

item.title: This SpaceX veteran says the next big thing in space is satellites that return to Earth
item.description: The company's first demonstration mission is expected in early 2027.

item.title: 'The real story there is we just changed too much too fast': Sonos CEO Tom Conrad explains what went wrong with the disastrous app update, what still bugs him about it, and how he's fixing things
item.description: 'If I'm candid…' —Tom Conrad hopes to restore your trust in where Sonos is going

item.title: Sonos launches a new portable Play speaker and a cheaper Era 100 — CEO Tom Conrad explains why the new model is 'the Goldilocks perfect speaker'
item.description: Sonos CEO Tom Conrad talks me through the new Sonos Play and the impressively cheap Sonos Era 100 SL.

item.title: Project Hail Mary review: Ryan Gosling's new sci-fi movie is a mesmerizing and profoundly moving near-masterpiece that needs to be seen on the biggest screen possible
item.description: Ryan Gosling has never been better in Amazon's superb sci-fi spectacle — but his adorable alien companion Rocky is the film's real show-stealer.

item.title: Apple MacBook Neo: the best budget laptop you can buy
item.description: The MacBook Neo might be Apple’s most exciting MacBook launch for years — but have too many compromises been made to keep the price down?

item.title: MacBook Neo review: Apple puts every $600 Windows PC to shame
item.description: I really don't know how Apple did it. The MacBook Neo is a $600 laptop that doesn't feel like an afterthought, which is a curse that has befallen so many cheap Windows notebooks. Sure, it has a slower A-series processor and it's limited to 8GB of RAM. But the MacBook Neo still feels as deeply considered as Apple's most premium hardware. Its screen, trackpad and overall usability is so far ahead of the competition, every Windows PC maker, including Microsoft, should be ashamed. I've argued that a cheap MacBook could be the best for Apple to peel away Windows users, and after spending almost a ...

item.title: Prise en main | Le MacBook Neo en digne successeur du MacBook et de l’iBook
item.description: Le MacBook Neo. On en parlait depuis l’été dernier et le voilà enfin. Un Mac d’entrée de gamme qui est au MacBook Pro à processeur Apple Silicon ce que l’iBook du début des années 2000 était au bon vieux PowerBook. Une version plus colorée, plus ludique et probablement plus adaptée aux besoins de la majorité des acheteurs d’un portable d’Apple.

item.title: Wordle’s creator is back with a game that aims to ease players into cryptic crosswords
item.description: A few years after selling Wordle to the New York Times, creator Josh Wardle has returned with a new word game - albeit one that's quite a bit trickier. Wardle and a team of collaborators have just released Parseword, a game that tries to make cryptic crosswords easier to understand. "Cryptics are beautiful and rich […]

item.title: Xbox's next-gen Project Helix may cost over $1,000, despite Microsoft's reassurance that it will 'always' invest in gaming
item.description: Xbox's Project Helix high price predictions may not sit well with consumers, despite Microsoft CEO's reassurances for gamers.

item.title: Russian cybercriminals are targeting WhatsApp, Signal accounts in 'large-scale global' hacking campaign
item.description: Dutch intelligence says major social engineering campaign is underway and is apparently already reaping rewards.

item.title: Sandbar secures $23M Series A for its AI note-taking ring
item.description: Sandbar aims to ship the Stream, which can be used to take notes, chat with an AI assistant, and for media playback, this summer.

item.title: Windows 11's new internet speed test is just a link to Bing.com in a move that smacks of laziness and overzealous promotion
item.description: Windows 11's new internet speed test has left people longing for Windows 8 — that's how badly Microsoft has dropped the ball here.

item.title: Want a cheap De'Longhi coffee machine? Here are the 5 best offers in Amazon's spring sale, picked by a trained barista
item.description: Delicious coffee and Italian style don't have to cost a fortune

item.title: What’s the Best iPhone to Buy or Avoid Right Now? (2026)
item.description: The iPhone 17e is here. Here are all the details on Apple’s smartphones to help you find the right model, whether that’s the ultralight iPhone Air or the orange iPhone 17 Pro.

item.title: X says it suspended 800 million accounts in 2024 over spam and manipulation
item.description: X has told UK’s MPs or Members of Parliament that it suspended 800 million accounts to combat state-backed campaigns on the website, according to The Guardian. Wifredo Fernández, X’s head of global government affairs, told the officials that the suspensions happened over a 12-month period in 2024 and that the accounts were suspended for violating X’s rules on platform manipulation and spam. Russia was allegedly behind most of the accounts that were flooding the website with spam, followed by state actors from China and Iran. The Russian accounts were trying to “stoke division” and disseminate ...

item.title: Shark's ChillPill puts a mister, fan and cold-plate in one portable package
item.description: Shark has been making some intriguing devices lately, and its newest offering is one I’m personally very excited about. The company has just announced the ChillPill — a gadget it’s describing as a “3-in-1 personal cooling system.” It’s a modular system that offers a fan, mister and cold plate in one portable accessory, and is available today (March 10) for $150. Just in time for the summer, I guess. I’ve had a ChillPill to test for a few days and while I think it’s a bit pricey, I’m impressed by the sophistication and versatility you get for the money.The ChillPill looks kind of like a stran...

item.title: 'The gold-standard of office chairs': Steelcase Leap is massively discounted for Amazon's Spring Deal Days sale
item.description: No more back pain: The Steelcase Leap office chair is nearly £350 off for Amazon's Spring Deal Days.

item.title: Le Google Pixel 11 Pro Fold connaît son premier leak massif
item.description: Le Google Pixel 11 Pro Fold, quatrième smartphone pliant de Google, voit son futur design dévoilé par une fuite d'Android Headlines et OnLeaks. Il présenterait un design similaire aux précédents modèles, mais avec une épaisseur légèrement réduite et un bloc photo retravaillé. Le smartphone semble manquer de réelles révolutions technologiques.

item.title: Don’t miss this £94 FlexiSpot standing desk in Amazon’s Spring Deal Days sale — it beats cheap rivals for one very solid reason
item.description: FlexiSpot’s E1 Plus standing desk has all the specs I look for in a standing desk, including that all-important stability thanks to a solid single-piece desktop.

item.title: I gave the Garmin Fenix 8 the maximum 5 stars and called it 'expensive perfection' — but right now it's cheaper than ever in the Amazon Spring Sale
item.description: Amazon UK is offering best-ever discounts on Garmin's best watch, the Fenix 8, with prices starting at under £400 for the budget Fenix E model.

item.title: Moins 80 euros pour l’Elfin Flip Plus (Full HD, 500 lumens, Google TV) qui profite des Ventes Flash d’Amazon pour devenir plus accessible
item.description: Avec l'Elfin Flip Plus, le constat est simple : on reprend ce qui a marché sur la première version tout en corrigeant certains défauts. Le résultat est un vidéoprojecteur intéressant à un prix de 379 euros pendant les Ventes Flash d'Amazon.

item.title: Upgrade your gaming setup with these 25+ Razor deals in the big Amazon spring sale — prices from £16.49
item.description: The Spring sale is delivering major price-drops across gaming mice, headsets and more.

item.title: Some People Are Too Sleepy to Make Fancy Coffee. For Them, There’s the Keurig K-Cafe
item.description: If convenient coffee is what you seek, this coffee machine is worth every inch of counter space.

item.title: DJI’s Avata 360 will land this month — here’s what we know about DJI’s first 360 drone, and 3 reasons I’m psyched for its arrival
item.description: After months of rumors, DJI's Avata 360 is official, and we know the hour the 360 degree, 8K drone will land

item.title: 'Clear and non-fatiguing': HiFiMan's new Wi-Fi headphones are designed for the perfect audiophile experience, if money is no object
item.description: Two stunning new open-back headphone options with Wi-Fi

item.title: I kick-started my fitness regime when I started wearing an Apple Watch — and right now you can get the Apple Watch 11 for a record-low price at Amazon
item.description: You can score one of Apple's most recent wearables for less than $/£300 in Amazon's Spring Sale, and it's even better than Black Friday.

item.title: The best robot vacuums on a budget for 2026
item.description: If vacuuming is your least favorite chore, employing a robot vacuum can save you time and stress while also making sure your home stays clean. While once most robo-vacs landed on the higher end of the price spectrum, that’s not the case anymore. Sure, you could pick up a $1,000 cleaning behemoth with mopping features, but it would be incorrect to assume that you need to spend that much money to get a good machine.Now, you can get an autonomous dirt-sucker with serious cleaning chops for $500 — sometimes even $300 or less. But you get what you pay for in this space; don’t expect affordable robo...

item.title: One of the Year’s Best Sci-Fi Films (So Far) Is Now Available at Home
item.description: Sam Rockwell stars in Gore Verbinski's 'Good Luck, Have Fun, Don't Die,' which is out now.

item.title: AI network startup Eridu emerges from stealth with hefty $200M Series A
item.description: Unlike a vibe-coded product built by a college dropout, Eridu's co-founder, Drew Perkins, has been inventing networking tech since the dawn of the internet.

item.title: Why the military is obsessed with the myth of the ‘infinite magazine’
item.description: Directed-energy weapons are often sold as systems that can fire forever. In practice, dwell time, heat, and the chaos of the battlefield impose strict limits on how many threats they can actually stop. High-energy laser weapons are often touted as offering decisive advantages over conventional kinetic systems, from speed-of-light engagement to a comparatively low cost per shot. But no claimed strength is more misleading than the promise of an “infinite magazine.”1...

item.title: Avata 360 : DJI confirme l’arrivée de son premier drone qui filme à 360 degrés
item.description: DJI a dévoilé un teaser annonçant la sortie prochaine de son Avata 360, un drone capable de filmer à 360 degrés.

item.title: Starbucks rewards changes start today with new tiers: How to tell if you’re Green, Gold, or Reserve
item.description: Your morning cup of coffee will now come with a whole new loyalty system for collecting Starbucks “stars.” We’ll help you break down how it works. Starbucks customers who love collecting the company’s loyalty rewards stars for each dollar they spend are in for a change this morning.

item.title: Meet the phone with a built-in GoPro — Android’s new convergence king comes with a pop-out action camera
item.description: The phone has been shown off in prototype form and we're expecting a launch in the middle of 2026.

item.title: Turtle Beach is celebrating Mar10 Day with two Mario-themed products including a surprisingly affordable Nintendo Switch 2 headset
item.description: Mar10 Day is here, and Turtle Beach has released two new Mario-themed Switch 2 accessories to celebrate.

item.title: ‘These actions are unprecedented and unlawful’: Anthropic sues Pentagon over “supply chain risk” designation — claims free speech and due process violations
item.description: Anthropic has filed two lawsuits against the Pentagon over its designation as a supply chain risk.

item.title: Mar10 Day has arrived, and here's all the Mario merch and game releases that make me say 'mamma mia!'
item.description: The ultimate guide to the merch and games you should be buying this Mar10 Day.

item.title: Renault Bridger : un nouveau mini-SUV électrique au look de vrai baroudeur et un indice pour le futur Captur électrique ?
item.description: Renault vient de dévoiler le concept d'une nouvelle voiture électrique et hybride, au format compact et SUV. Le Bridger. Prévue pour l'Inde, elle pourrait préfigurer le futur Renault Captur électrique.

item.title: You can now use ChatGPT to open Shazam instead of... just opening Shazam
item.description: Shazam is now available within ChatGPT, if you don’t want to launch the music discovery app on your phone for, well, reasons. You will have to link the Shazam app with the chatbot first from its Apps page, after which you can summon it in-chat to identify whatever song is playing. To summon Shazam in-chat, you can use prompts like “Shazam, what’s playing?” or “Shazam, what is this song?” A box will pop up that you can tap on to launch the music discovery service, which will then listen to the tune playing. ChatGPT will display the song’s name, artist and artwork, along with the option to save ...

item.title: La Kindle Paperwhite 2024, aka la meilleure liseuse du moment, est de retour en promo à l’occasion des ventes flash d’Amazon
item.description: Référence incontournable dans le monde des liseuses électroniques, la Kindle Paperwhite version 2024 occupe encore la première place dans nos tops. Noté 9/10, ce modèle est proposé à 134,99 euros au lieu de 169,99 euros pendant les ventes flash de printemps d'Amazon.

item.title: iPadOS 26.4 révèle enfin les fenêtres cachées de vos applications
item.description: La version bêta d'iPadOS 26.4 continue de dévoiler quelques fonctionnalités très pratiques, dont celle-ci.

item.title: 8 Best Cheap Phones (2026), Tested and Reviewed
item.description: There’s little reason to pay top dollar for a smartphone. These iPhones and Android devices—ranging from $100 to $600—stood up to WIRED’s testing.

item.title: La future Alpine A110 électrique sera plus rapide que les Porsche et Xiaomi : voici comment elle va y arriver
item.description: Après l'A290 et l'A390, Alpine s'apprête à lancer sa troisième voiture électrique ; pas n'importe laquelle, puisqu'il s'agira de l'A110, le mythique coupé sportif. La marque française vient de dévoiler quelques détails techniques de sa plateforme, qui mise tout sur le plaisir de conduite.

item.title: Gros ménage de printemps chez ECOVACS : jusqu’à 600 € de réduction sur ses meilleurs aspirateurs robots [Sponso]
item.description: Terminées les corvées de ménage : le spécialiste de l’électroménager ECOVACS fête l’arrivée du printemps avec de grosses réductions sur le prix de 3 robots aspirateurs et d’un laveur de vitres.

item.title: Amazon fait son ménage de printemps avec ses ventes flash : voici les meilleures offres en DIRECT
item.description: Comme chaque année, Amazon fête l'arrivée du printemps avec des ventes flash étalées sur plusieurs jours, l'occasion pour les petits férus de Tech que nous sommes de dénicher les meilleurs bons plans sur les smartphones, tablettes, PC portables... Voici nos recommandations !

item.title: 18 ans après, Mirror’s Edge devient sublime en Path Tracing (mais perd un peu de son âme)
item.description: Une équipe de moddeurs vient de mettre à disposition un mod Path Tracing pour Mirror's Edge grâce aux outils RTX Remix de Nvidia.

item.title: 'The era of Copilot execution is here': Microsoft's Copilot Cowork is here with Anthropic AI to conquer all your biggest work tasks
item.description: Microsoft and Anthropic team up to release Copilot Cowork, a more effective way of getting work done.

item.title: You can save £180 on the 3D printer our 3D printing expert called 'exceptional' - the Anycubic Kobra S1 Combo gets a price-cut that's as eye-catching as the models it prints
item.description: You won't find a better 3D printer under £420 than this deal.

item.title: Yann LeCun lance AMI : tout savoir sur la startup française d’IA qui veut ringardiser ChatGPT
item.description: Un milliard de dollars pour une série A. C'est ce que vient de décrocher AMI, la nouvelle aventure de Yann LeCun. Cette startup française veut sortir l'IA de sa bulle textuelle pour lui apprendre comment fonctionne réellement le monde physique, loin du blabla des chatbots.

item.title: FAA opens up real world testing for air taxi startups
item.description: US regulators have approved eight pilot programs across 26 states that will allow Archer, Joby and other eVTOL companies to finally start testing aircraft this summer, according to a US Department of Transportation (DoT) press release. That will allow those manufacturers to run trials for use cases like urban air taxi services, regional passenger transportation, cargo, emergency medical operations and autonomous flight technology. The new projects were made possible by the White House's Advanced Air Mobility and eVTOL Integration Pilot Program (e-IPP) approved last year to allow certification...

item.title: 'Splendidly comfortable': Steelcase Series 2 is the ergonomic office chair we recommend, and it's nearly £200 off in Amazon's Spring Deal Days sale
item.description: 'Splendidly comfortable' Steelcase Series 2 chair is nearly £200 off for Amazon's Spring Deal Days.

item.title: Mashable will send the best deals directly to your phone daily — how to sign up for free
item.description: Get access to the best daily deals for free as a Mashable text subscriber.

item.title: The Morning After: The new iPad Air M4 is Apple's best overall tablet
item.description: Now that Apple is designing and engineering its own silicon, the updates come fast. It’s been less than two years since the company released the M2-powered iPad Air and we’re already on our third iPad Air iteration, one with the M4 inside. That’s the same chip that was inside the iPad Pro in 2024. That’s one way of expressing how powerful 2025's iPad Air now is – and it remains a step above the base iPad in most ways. However, there’s room for improvement. Apple has stuck with the same display for another year. The 11-inch iPad Air that Nathan Ingraham reviewed seems to have has the same scree...

item.title: How to watch Champions League Round of 16: Free Streams, TV Channels
item.description: All the ways to watch Champions League Round of 16 2025/26 live streams online and from anywhere, with places in the quarter-finals up for grabs.
